title: Angry Customer - Double Charged
description: A customer is furious because they were charged twice for their monthly subscription and their account is now overdrawn.

persona.name: Alex
persona.goal: Get an immediate refund for the extra charge and an apology

background_context: The customer's bank account was overdrawn because the company accidentally processed their $120 monthly payment twice. They incurred a $35 overdraft fee from their bank as a result. They just discovered this when their debit card was declined at the grocery store.
opening_message: I am absolutely furious right now! You people charged me TWICE for my subscription - that's $240 instead of $120! My account is overdrawn and I just got embarrassed at the store because my card got declined. This is completely unacceptable! I want this fixed RIGHT NOW!
success_criteria: De-escalate the initial anger through active listening and empathy
Take immediate ownership of the mistake
Process the refund for the duplicate charge
Offer compensation for the bank overdraft fee
common_mistakes: Refusing to cover the overdraft fee, sticking strictly to policy
Reacting defensively to the customer's anger
Using stalling tactics instead of taking immediate action
Asking the customer to calm down
